title: Build a stream consumer group
description: Consume a Redis Stream with a group, ack processed entries, and reclaim entries from dead consumers.
body: Steps: 1. Create the stream and a consumer group (XGROUP CREATE) at a starting id. 2. Read with XREADGROUP using a per-consumer name; process each entry. 3. XACK only after the effect is durable; unacked entries stay in the Pending Entries List. 4. Periodically inspect XPENDING and XCLAIM/XAUTOCLAIM entries idle past a threshold so a crashed consumer's work is reprocessed. 5. Trim the stream (XADD MAXLEN or XTRIM) to bound memory. Rollback point: revert to reading without a group (XREAD) for a single consumer. Validation: an entry whose consumer died is reclaimed and reprocessed, acked entries are not redelivered, and stream length stays bounded.
